overview: Specializes in testosterone replacement therapy, hormone replacement therapy, medical weight loss, and peptide therapy delivered through customized treatment plans. Operates four locations across Western New York and provides telemedicine services for New York residents.
highlights: Four Western New York locations plus telemedicine
Blood work review and body composition analysis included
Peptide therapy including IGF-1 LR3, Hexarelin, and TB-500
targetAudience: Men aged 40+ with low testosterone and individuals seeking weight loss or anti-aging health optimization.
